template_data.lead_html: She was convinced her company was too small for federal work. Six years in business. Three million in revenue. She was wrong.

rows.what_html: "We don't have the clout." — the sentence I've heard a hundred times
Schedule applied and approved — the process she almost never started
First federal award — not luck. Just the right information, finally.

template_data.closer: THE MYTH COST TWO YEARS. NOT THE PAPERWORK.
template_data.image_headline: THE MYTH WAS THE ONLY BARRIER
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Left side: illustrated journey arc with three milestone markers labeled 'THE CALL', 'SCHEDULE APPROVED', 'FIRST AWARD' in 1-2 word labels. Right side: illustrated professional woman in blazer, confident posture, looking forward. Bold headline top: 'THE MYTH WAS THE ONLY BARRIER'. Highlighted callout box center with short phrase '14 MONTHS. ONE AWARD.' Cream background, dark navy accents, coral highlight on callout box. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
